case_title: BVI, LLC. VS. WEB TOES, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BVI, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEB TOES, LLC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY BVI, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT WEB TOES, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF BVI LLC, IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSH HARRIS, MANAGING MEMBER. DEFENDANT WEB TOES LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-03-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO SYSTEM SCHEDULEING ERROR TO JUN-17-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BVI, LLC IS PRESENT AT 3:30. DEFENDANT WEB TOES LLC IS PRESENT AT 1:30PM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL. AS TO DEFENDANT WEB TOES, LLC.
